name: Topcoder Community App - Support LaTex formulas in Markdown rendering
description:
### Overview

The Topcoder Community App is the main application used to display challenges, handle registration, and accept submissions on the Topcoder platform.

You can find the source code here:

https://github.com/topcoder-platform/community-app

### Local deployment

Instructions for deploying and building the community app locally can be found here:

https://platform-ui.topcoder.com/dev-center/getting-started

### Issue
The full requirements can be found here:

https://github.com/topcoder-platform/community-app/issues/6761

### Submission

Your submission should be a git patch file against commit hash 47be786c in the `latex_support` branch
